response.justification: While the candidate's 20-year career meets the minimum experience threshold, the role demands recognized AI expertise, director-level strategic advisory capabilities, and demonstrated AI product leadership — none of which this profile meaningfully establishes. AI involvement is confined to a single current role started in 2025, there is no advanced degree, and the career arc is that of a strong individual contributor rather than a principal-level strategist who advises enterprise customers and shapes platform vision.
strengths: 20 years of polyglot engineering spanning web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — meets the raw tenure requirement
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform still in active use
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals awareness of the current AI landscape
concerns: AI credentials are thin and very recent — no demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No evidence of director-level scope: strategic customer advising, cross-org influence, or inspiring external audiences
No advanced degree and no cloud platform depth; AWS CDK and Kubernetes usage are present but not at the cloud-strategy level the role requires
